fields.heading: FlowBoard Pro
fields.subheading: The project management platform that adapts to how your team actually works. Not the other way around.

features.title: Instant Setup
features.description: Import your existing projects from Jira, Asana, or Trello in under 5 minutes with our migration wizard.

features.title: Flexible Views
features.description: Kanban, Gantt, timeline, list, or calendar — switch views instantly without losing context or filters.

features.title: AI Automation
features.description: Smart task routing, deadline prediction, and workload balancing powered by machine learning.

features.title: Enterprise Security
features.description: SOC 2 Type II certified with SSO, SCIM provisioning, and granular role-based access controls.

features.title: 200+ Integrations
features.description: Connect with Slack, GitHub, Figma, Salesforce, and hundreds more through our native integration marketplace.

features.title: Real-Time Analytics
features.description: Custom dashboards with velocity charts, burndown reports, and team health metrics updated in real time.

tabs.label: Description
tabs.content:
Built for Modern Teams

FlowBoard Pro is the culmination of five years of research into how high-performing teams collaborate. Unlike traditional project management tools that force rigid workflows, FlowBoard adapts to your team's natural rhythm.

Whether you're running two-week sprints, continuous delivery, or a hybrid model, FlowBoard Pro provides the structure you need without the overhead you don't. Every feature was designed with one question in mind: does this help teams ship better work, faster?

Key Capabilities

  • Adaptive Workflows — Create custom stages, automations, and approval gates that match your process
  • Cross-Project Dependencies — Visualize and manage dependencies across teams and projects
  • Time Tracking — Built-in timers and manual entry with billable/non-billable categorization
  • Document Hub — Rich text docs, wikis, and file attachments linked directly to tasks

tabs.label: Specifications
tabs.content:
Technical Specifications

DeploymentCloud (SaaS) or Self-hosted (Docker/Kubernetes)
APIREST and GraphQL with webhook support
SSOSAML 2.0, OIDC, Google, Microsoft, Okta
Data ResidencyUS, EU, APAC regions available
Uptime SLA99.99% for Enterprise plans
StorageUnlimited file storage (Enterprise), 100GB (Pro)
UsersUnlimited (Enterprise), up to 500 (Pro)
Audit LogFull activity log with 2-year retention

tabs.label: Reviews
tabs.content:
Customer Reviews

4.8 out of 5 based on 2,340 reviews on G2

"FlowBoard Pro replaced three separate tools for us. Our team velocity increased 35% in the first quarter." — Director of Engineering, Series C Fintech
"The AI automation features alone save our PMs about 6 hours per week. The ROI was immediate." — VP Product, Healthcare SaaS

Read all customer reviews →

reviews.title: Transformed our project delivery
reviews.body: We migrated from Jira and haven't looked back. The onboarding was seamless, and our team adoption hit 95% within the first week. The AI task routing alone has saved us dozens of hours.
reviews.author: Rachel Kim, Engineering Lead

reviews.title: Best PM tool for distributed teams
reviews.body: With team members across 4 time zones, async collaboration is critical. FlowBoard's smart notifications and timezone-aware scheduling have eliminated our meeting overhead.
reviews.author: Tom Andersen, Product Manager

reviews.title: Powerful but has a learning curve
reviews.body: The depth of features is impressive — automation rules, custom fields, portfolio views — but it took our team about two weeks to fully explore everything. The onboarding guides helped a lot.
reviews.author: Nina Petrova, Operations Director

reviews.title: Worth every penny
reviews.body: We evaluated 8 different tools before choosing FlowBoard Pro. The combination of flexibility, security certifications, and responsive support made it an easy decision for our security team.
reviews.author: David Osei, CISO

fields.heading: Try FlowBoard Pro Free for 14 Days
fields.description: No credit card required. Full access to all features. Cancel anytime.
